---
title: "Introduction"
---


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Introduction
1. Know who your professor is
1. Identify one reason language is worth studying
1. Identify one reason that the brain is worth studying
1. Recognize that there are multiple levels at which one can understand a cognitive system (computational, algorithmic, implementation), and understand the differences
1. Define *functional specialization*
:::


Classes in this unit:

| Date | Topic | Reading | Slides | Poll |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 9/27 | [Overview](#overview)  | None | | [Introductions](https://www.menti.com/bl6rvxw8d8o1) | 
| Tues 9/1 | [Why neuroscience of language?](#why) | SGN Ch. 1: *Introduction* | [<span class="blue-badge">Overview ↗</span>](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1S-twq_R9KZWHKwUxCgpskvh7g66OaMdo1Z-OYOKt820/edit?slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0#slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0) | |


### Course Overview {#overview}

* Introductions
* Course site (you are here)
* [Syllabus](index.qmd)
* [Assignments](requirements.qmd)
* [Schedule](schedule.md)


### Why study the neuroscience of language? {#why}
